html:
Exclusive to:

Junk Pile is a structure that appears naturally in the Junk Yard and in Hermit Island (after defeating Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, and Possessed Varg) in different sizes. It was introduced in the From Beyond Update. Players can rummage the Junk Piles for 1-3 times depending on the size of the pile, and each completed rummage will give either an item, a mob, or nothing at all.

If the player run away from the Junk Yard area after starting the Scrappy Werepig fight, he will retreat to the Teetering Junk Pile and throw a pile of garbage at them, which, if it hits the floor, will leave a Junk Pile at place. This can be performed infinitely for as much junk as the player is willing to spawn.

Loot

Rummaging the Junk Piles can either find a mob or an item. They are separated into 2 different loot tables.

There is 10% chance to spawn a Mob and the chance of each mob is listed below. Any Spider, Catcoon or Spider Warrior found inside will be aggressive toward the player.

Chance Mobs
44.44%
22.22%
11.11%

The remaining 90% of the time, the items table is used instead.

Chance Items
25.00% Nothing
12.5%
6.25%
3.125%

Trivia

  • The Junk Pile was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Gallery

  • Junk Pile Map Icon

"junk_pile"
“A good junk pile rummage? I'll never refuse.”
–Wilson
“I'm not too proud to rifle through some trash.”
–Willow
“Might be something inside Wolfgang can use.”
–Wolfgang
“Could there be something worthwhile hiding deep inside?”
–Wendy
“RIPE FOR THE SCAVENGING”
–WX-78
“I may find something of use within.”
–Wickerbottom
“Wouldn't hurt to root around there a bit, eh?”
–Woodie
“Have I really been reduced to sifting through the trash?”
–Maxwell
“Mayhaps a treasure lies inside?”
–Wigfrid
“There might be something fun to play with in there!”
–Webber
“Perhaps there is something delicious hiding in its center?”
–Warly
“Pile of stuff”
–Wormwood
“Folks underestimate how much good stuff you can find in a scrap pile.”
–Winona
“Could it hide a surprise inside?”
–Wortox
“If anything good in there, it mine!”
–Wurt
“One person's trash is another's treasure!”
–Walter
“There might be something worth my time in there.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Junk Pile là một công trình xuất hiện tự nhiên ở Junk Yard và ở Hermit Island (sau khi đánh bại Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, và Becomeed Varg) với các kích cỡ khác nhau. Nó được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật From Beyond. Người chơi có thể lục lọi Đống Rác từ 1-3 lần tùy thuộc vào kích thước của đống và mỗi lần lục lọi hoàn thành sẽ cho một vật phẩm, một mob hoặc không có gì cả.

'''Junk Pile''' is a structure that appears naturally in the [[Junk Yard]] and in [[Hermit Island]] (after defeating [[Crystal Deerclops]], [[Armored Bearger]], and [[Possessed Varg]]) in different sizes. It was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond]]'' Update. Players can rummage the Junk Piles for 1-3 times depending on the size of the pile, and each completed rummage will give either an item, a mob, or nothing at all. 

If the player run away from the Junk Yard area after starting the [[Scrappy Werepig]] fight, he will retreat to the [[Teetering Junk Pile]] and throw a pile of garbage at them, which, if it hits the floor, will leave a Junk Pile at place. This can be performed infinitely for as much junk as the player is willing to spawn.
